case_title: DANIEL BROIN VS. IMMUNE ENHANCEMENT PROJECT,INC A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MOVING PARTY PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Order Staying Enforcement Of Judgment To Protect Possible Set-Off In Relate Case
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas Crowell, Esq., of the Law Office of Thomas Crowell, Tel. 415.702.7213, for defendant and moving party;
James Carroll, Esq. of the Law Office of James Sansone, Tel. 707.542.5611, for plaintiff via Court Call.

RULING: The moving party provided the court with a copy of the proof of service. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT IMMUNE ENHANCEMENT PROJECT's Motion For Entry Of Order Staying Enforcement Of Judgment To Protect Possible Set-Off In Relate Case is granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: A. James Robertson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
